description.content: Product catalog operations
Returns a list of all available contact center products.
Tenant management and configuration
Returns a list of all tenants managed by the contact center.
Returns detailed configuration for a specific tenant.
Adds or removes product assignments for a tenant.
Updates usage limits and license counts for a tenant.
Returns all roles configured for a specific tenant.
Returns all Automatic Call Distributors (ACDs/queues) for a tenant.
Returns available presence/status options for agents in a tenant.
Returns all extensions configured for a specific tenant.
Updates configuration for a specific extension within a tenant.
Returns the SMS/MMS message count for a tenant.
Resets the SMS/MMS message count for a tenant.
Extension management
Returns all extensions configured for a specific tenant.
Updates configuration for a specific extension within a tenant.
Returns the current presence/state of a specific agent extension.
Call management and control
Returns a list of active and recent calls in the contact center.
Returns details for a specific call by its ID.
Executes a control action on an active call. Supported actions include startSuppression, stopSuppression, kill, wait_transfer, wait_redirect, wait_kill.
Searches calls by various criteria including calling number, called number, and date range.
Agent state management
Returns available presence/status options for agents in a tenant.
Updates the current agent's presence state (e.g., available, busy, on break).
Returns the current presence/state of a specific agent extension.
Role and permission management
Returns a list of all roles and permissions available in the system.
Returns all roles configured for a specific tenant.
CCS domain hostname

info.name: Windstream Enterprise Contact Center Services API

description.content:
The Windstream Enterprise Contact Center Services (CCS) API provides programmatic access to contact center operations, enabling developers to route calls, web chats, and text messages, manage agent states, configure tenants, and monitor queue activity. The REST API is complemented by a WebSocket interface for real-time event streaming.

Contact Support:
 Name: Windstream Enterprise Developer Support
